author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text:
The @stephen_wolfram language just launched support for @IPFSbot as a storage system! This is absolutely phenomenal and makes manipulation over distributed datasets super convenient for everyone 🌟

There is a lot more in the 12.1 release, check out https://writings.stephenwolfram.com/2020/03/in-less-than-a-year-so-much-new-launching-version-12-1-of-wolfram-language-mathematica
#IPFS
